overall.description: A first-person exploration of the Ravenclaw common room from Hogwarts Legacy, beginning in a dormitory bedroom with Gothic windows and blue curtains, transitioning through corridors into a grand circular common room featuring a starry vaulted ceiling and mechanical orrery, ascending a spiral staircase, and exiting to an outdoor terrace with panoramic views of castle spires and surrounding mountains.

flowing blue curtains framing the windows
white cushioned window seats beneath the Gothic windows
large blue carpet covering the wooden floor
dark wooden door with metal hardware leading to the corridor
tall wooden bookshelf with books and decorative items
brass telescope on a wooden stand near the window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a Ravenclaw dormitory bedroom with high Gothic windows draped in blue silk curtains. The camera moves slowly through the room, revealing window seats, a blue carpet, wooden bookshelves, and a brass telescope, establishing the cozy yet grand magical atmosphere.

approaching the large archway entrance to the main common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior corridors toward the grand common room

entered.detail: dark wood paneled walls with decorative trim
large stone archway leading to the circular common room
wooden notice board with papers and posters pinned to it

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the bedroom into a narrow corridor with dark wood paneling, passing a bulletin board and approaching a large stone archway that frames the entrance to the main common room.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand circular common room with starry vaulted ceiling and mechanical orrery

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the magnificent circular Ravenclaw common room with its distinctive starry blue vaulted ceiling and ornate mechanical orrery at the center. A student sits reading at a table as the camera explores the space, passing a grand piano and bookshelves before approaching the spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase ascending to terrace exit

events.description: reaching the top of the staircase and approaching the exterior door

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase toward the upper terrace exit

entered.detail: grey stone wall section near the exit door
grey painted wooden door with metal handle leading outside

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the spiral staircase, the mechanical orrery and common room furniture falling away below, approaching a stone wall and wooden door that leads to the exterior terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle terrace with topiary and panoramic mountain views

walking along the terrace edge toward the clock tower view

agents.ego_description: walking along the outdoor terrace, admiring the castle architecture, topiary, and mountain scenery

neatly trimmed cone-shaped evergreen bushes in large stone planters
Gothic stone towers and spires of the castle complex
distant mountain range with valleys and forested slopes
stone column with eagle statue on top, surrounded by flowers
stone benches along the terrace walls
tall stone clock tower with pointed roof and clock face

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a stone terrace with neatly trimmed topiary and stone benches, revealing breathtaking views of the castle's Gothic towers, a prominent clock tower, and the mountainous landscape beyond. The glass dome of the common room is visible from the outside as the camera explores the perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a student bedroom into the expansive grandeur of the Ravenclaw common room. It begins within a cozy dormitory, gliding past blue silk curtains and a brass telescope under high Gothic windows. As the camera leaves the room, the space narrows into a dark wood-paneled corridor that leads toward a large stone archway. The scene then opens wide into a magnificent circular hall, where the lighting shifts to reveal a starry blue vaulted ceiling and a central mechanical orrery. The camera continues to explore this vast space, passing a reading student and a grand piano before finally approaching a spiral staircase.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from the interior of the common room to an expansive outdoor terrace overlooking the highlands. It begins by climbing a spiral staircase, leaving the mechanical orrery and furniture behind as the camera approaches a stone wall and wooden door. As the door opens, the scene shifts from the enclosed stone interior to a bright stone terrace adorned with neatly trimmed topiary and stone benches. The view then expands to reveal the Gothic towers of the castle and a prominent clock tower set against a mountainous landscape, while the glass dome of the common room becomes visible from the outside as the camera explores the perimeter.
